word: G755 - ἀρχιτρίκλινος - architríklinos - ar-khee-tree'-klee-nos - Governor of the feast

sections.paragraph:
ἀρχιτρίκλινος - architriklinos - ar-khee-tree'-klee-nos

From G746 and a compound of G5140 and G2827 (a dinner bed, because composed of three couches); director of the entertainment: - governor (ruler) of the feast.
